content:
# Discrete Fracture Network

**Summary**: A 3D model representing the geometry and distribution of fractures in a rock mass.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] constructed a discrete-fracture-network to simulate reservoir properties.

## Scientific Context

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] Used to model permeability and connectivity in fractured media.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012]] Stochastic modeling based on orientation, length, and intensity.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The DFN model integrated both deterministic faults and stochastically modeled fracture sets. ([[2012-abdelgader|Abdelgader, 2012, p. 132]])
